Water Softener with Chlorine Filtration

A high-performance water softening system with advanced features to improve water quality. It enhances skin and hair softness, protects water-using appliances, and reduces soap and cleaning supply usage by over 75%.

  • Softer skin and hair
  • Energy savings

HW800 ALKAPRO

Say goodbye to hidden contaminants in your water and hello to safe, great-tasting hydration for the whole family with HW800 AlkaPro. This smart, tankless Reverse Osmosis (R.O.) system from Honest Water Co.—trusted for years in Dallas, Texas—makes it easy to enjoy clean, refreshing water straight from your tap. Built for everyday convenience and using the latest technology, HW800 AlkaPro keeps your water healthy and delicious while being kind to the environment.

  • 100 GPD filtration capacity
  • Eliminates harmful substances
  • Improves water taste
  • Includes a complete installation

Presediment Filter

Designed to capture dirt, sand, rust, and sediment before they enter your home, this pre-sediment filter protects plumbing and downstream filtration systems. It helps maintain cleaner water flow and extends the life of your whole-home water treatment system.

  • Supports health
  • Better tasting water
  • Improves performance
  • Enhances beverage flavor

FAQS

Exploring our common questions answered.

What is a whole-home water filtration system?

A whole-home water filtration system filters the water at the main point of entry, ensuring clean, filtered water is available throughout your entire home for drinking, cooking, bathing, and cleaning.

How does reverse osmosis work?
Reverse osmosis (RO) works by pushing water through a semipermeable membrane that removes contaminants like chlorine, heavy metals, and other impurities, providing purified water for drinking and cooking.
How often should I replace the filters?
The frequency of filter replacements depends on the specific product. For most systems, filters need to be replaced every 6 to 12 months, but we recommend following the product guidelines or contacting us for advice.
Why should I choose a water filtration system for my home?

A water filtration system improves the quality of your water by removing harmful toxins, chemicals, and contaminants, ensuring your family has access to clean, safe, and healthy water.

What contaminants does your filtration system remove?
Our filtration systems remove a wide range of contaminants, including chlorine, lead, heavy metals, pesticides, bacteria, and other harmful toxins, providing 100% protection for your home’s water.
Will the filtration system affect my water pressure?
Our systems are designed to maintain optimal water pressure while providing clean water. You won’t experience significant drops in water pressure with our filtration solutions.
